title: CSS Display Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the fundamental behaviors and layout modes applied using the display property.

questions.question: Which display value makes an element take up the full width available and start on a new line?
Which display value allows you to set a specific width and height while still keeping the element on the same line as others?
What is the primary difference between 'display: none' and 'visibility: hidden'?
options: 'display: none' removes the element from the layout entirely, while 'visibility: hidden' leaves the empty space where the element was.
'visibility: hidden' removes the element, 'display: none' only hides the colors.

questions.question: Which display value turns an element into a container for the Flexbox layout model?
Can you set a specific 'width' and 'height' on an element with 'display: inline'?
